task.objective: Narrow the next Proofrail product direction to an AI PR Evidence Gate: a small, practical first product that turns an AI-authored pull request into an evidence packet separating claims, observed evidence, missing evidence, scope, and review needs, without implementing runtime behavior in this task.

forbidden: language adapters or adapter capability implementation
CLI, API, MCP, web, GitHub, SARIF, or other delivery surface implementation
paid cloud runner or SaaS enablement

requirements: Commit PRODUCT-FOCUS-001 as the first artifact on the branch before editing authority-bearing current-state records.
Update README.md, AGENTS.md, and docs/constitution/product-constitution.md so the current next product focus is AI PR Evidence Gate, not a broad complete Proofrail platform build.
Create docs/plans/active/phase-2-ai-pr-evidence-gate.md defining the narrowed Phase 2 objective as a practical evidence packet for AI-authored GitHub pull requests.
Update docs/plans/active/phase-2-boundary-definition.md to point to the narrowed AI PR Evidence Gate focus without treating PR #14 as implementation authority or independent acceptance evidence.
Preserve the core product principle: claim is not evidence; verify it.
Preserve Builder versus Reviewer separation, passing tests as evidence not authority, and PR merge as not a trusted release.

Explicitly de-scope complete product Verdict runtime, broad Evidence Bundle protocol completion, Inference Zone, model providers, adapters, delivery surfaces, repository inspection implementation, and verification execution implementation until later separately authorized tasks.
Do not implement product runtime behavior, production code, package code, scripts, tests, CI, adapters, delivery surfaces, model provider behavior, or Inference Zone behavior in this task.
Do not change canonical terminology, Verdict semantics, Evidence authority classes, Trust semantics, or product protocols.
Do not claim product readiness, trusted release, or an authoritative Proofrail product Verdict.
If any payment, billing, API key, credits, paid cloud runner, SaaS enablement, or cloud execution prompt appears, stop with BLOCKED_COST_RISK.
If Codex or local long-run execution limit is reached, stop with LIMIT_REACHED.

requiredInvariants: PRODUCT-FOCUS-001 is the first committed artifact on the task branch before current-state record edits.
The final diff is limited to the MTC and authorized focus/plan records.
The narrowed direction is an implementation roadmap focus, not product readiness or trusted release.
No production packages, scripts, tests, CI, generated projections, product protocols, canonical terminology, Verdict semantics, Evidence authority classes, or Trust semantics are changed.
The AI PR Evidence Gate focus remains claim/evidence/review-packet oriented and does not implement repository inspection or verification execution behavior.

stopConditions: The requested focus narrowing would require product semantic, Verdict semantic, Trust semantic, Evidence authority, canonical terminology, production code, test, CI, package, script, generated projection, or protocol changes
The task would require implementing repository inspection, verification execution, adapters, delivery surfaces, model provider behavior, or Inference Zone behavior
Authority-Change Preflight cannot authorize the current-state record updates before edits
Any payment, billing, API key, credits, paid cloud runner, SaaS enablement, or cloud execution prompt appears: BLOCKED_COST_RISK
Codex or local long-run limit is reached: LIMIT_REACHED
